name: flarepoint
description: Flarepoint — a hub of small, behavioural Claude Code plugins that make the AI's epistemic state explicit and persistent. Built on one shared substrate (fp-base).

plugins.name: fp-honesty
plugins.description: Annotate load-bearing claims with their epistemic basis (verified/inferred/recalled/guess) and a per-response footer tally. Pure annotation — never changes what the model does.

plugins.name: fp-bump
plugins.description: Sizes a SemVer version bump to the magnitude of your changes at commit time — the model judges major/minor/patch, you confirm. Suggests by default; never bumps silently unless you set auto.
